ROBERT BOLDT, ESQ., 213.680.8563, FOR DEFENDANT NONNI'S FOODS, LLC.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn For Prelim Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael D. Braun, Esq. of Braun Law Group, Tel. 310.836.6000, for plaintiff and moving party;
Beth Marie Weinstein, Esq. of Kirkland & Ellis, Tel. 213.680.8134, for defendants.

RULING: The matter was not argued. At this time, the Court denies without prejudice PLAINTIFFs TAMAR LARSEN & KIMBERLY SETHAVANISH's Motion for Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement. The Court discussed the terms of the settlement with the parties. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761
